Welcome, Anna. In my country, the most important custom is to be on time.
Thank you. I am always on time. Is a handshake the most common hello?
Yes. A firm handshake is the polite way to say hello here.
Good. Is a small gift a nice custom for a first meeting?
A small gift is kind. We also like formal and polite emails.
Thank you. I want to respect your culture and your customs.

Hello, Anna. I am your partner from the United States. Here is a quick note about business culture. In my country, it is very important to be on time. A meeting at nine starts at nine. We use a firm handshake to say hello. A small gift is nice, but it is not necessary. We like polite and direct emails. Thank you, and see you soon.

Today I learned about business culture in other countries. The most important custom is to be on time. In some countries, people are more formal than in Brazil. A handshake is the most common way to say hello. A small gift is the kindest thing for a first meeting. The most useful lesson is simple: be polite and respect the culture. I feel ready for my partners now.

First, Anna reads about the culture of the country. Then she learns the most important custom: be on time. Next, she practices a firm handshake. After that, she chooses a small gift for the partner. Finally, she writes a polite and formal email.
